name: AWS Orchestrator Agent
description: Stop writing Terraform by hand. AWS Orchestrator analyzes your infrastructure requirements and generates production-ready, security-hardened Terraform modules for AWS services.

extensions.description: Provides rich interactive UI components for AWS orchestration workflows including module review, deployment cards, and approval gates.
TalkOps UI extension providing rich metadata for agent discovery, capabilities display, and MCP server information.

capabilityDescription.title: What AWS Orchestrator Does
capabilityDescription.description: Instead of manually writing Terraform, the AWS Orchestrator analyzes your infrastructure needs and generates production-ready modules with security best practices baked in.
features: 🎯 Generates production-ready Terraform modules for AWS services
⚙️ Security-first: CIS benchmarks and best practices applied automatically
🧩 Human-in-the-loop approval gates for infrastructure changes

mcpServers.name: Terraform MCP Server
mcpServers.description: Provides Terraform registry operations, module search, provider documentation, and policy lookups for infrastructure-as-code workflows.

mcpServers.name: GitHub MCP Server
mcpServers.description: Provides GitHub integration for accessing repositories, creating issues, managing pull requests, and other GitHub API operations.

skills.name: Orchestrate AWS Services
examples: Can you help me in provisioning a new aws resource via terraform
Can you help me in creating a new terraform module for aws services

skills.name: Terraform Module Creation
skills.description: Creates terraform modules for AWS services
examples: Can you help me in creating a new terraform module for aws services
